symptom: Intermittent USB-C continuity fail on CC1/CC2 lines, ~2.5% of units in batch B-2025-44.
root_cause: Reflow oven zone 3 temperature profile had drifted 8C below spec, producing marginal solder joints on connector J4 pins 5-6.
resolution: Recalibrated reflow oven zone 3 thermocouple, re-ran profile qualification, reworked affected WIP.

symptom: USB-C port fails continuity test only after thermal cycling, not at first pass.
root_cause: Connector supplier changed adhesive backing material (rev C to rev D) which shrank more under thermal stress, straining the pin solder joints.
resolution: Reverted to rev C adhesive pending supplier corrective action; added incoming inspection check.

symptom: Power rail 3V3 out of tolerance on ~1% of units.
root_cause: Firmware default calibration constant for the buck regulator was left at the bring-up default instead of the production value.
resolution: Corrected firmware config default, added config-value assertion to ICT-1 test sequence.

symptom: RF calibration failures clustered on units built on second shift.
root_cause: Second-shift operators were using an uncalibrated reference antenna after the scheduled cal due date lapsed.
resolution: Enforced cal due-date interlock in station software; retrained shift on cal cart procedure.

symptom: Sporadic USB-C data line (D+/D-) fail, not correlated with any single component lot.
root_cause: Test fixture pogo pin wear on the FCT-2 nest caused increased contact resistance after ~40k insertions.
resolution: Replaced pogo pin block, added preventive-maintenance interval at 30k insertions.

symptom: Boundary-scan open detected on BGA U12 for a small population of boards.
root_cause: Insufficient stencil aperture on U12 footprint caused solder-paste volume shortfall on corner balls.
resolution: Increased stencil aperture 10%, added AOI check at U12 post-reflow.
